sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 29:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 29:1
items.html: Above the Tabur of the inner AK. This is because the bottom Hey is not incorporated in the screen of AB. Hence, it cannot expand below the Tabur, where it is the phase of the bottom Hey, meaning Malchut of the inner AK. (Ibid.)
